emails.subject: Meter 8741/1587 Nov 00
emails.body: Meter 8741/1587 Nov 00 Daren, I need a deal set up for Nov 00. Per Gary Hanks, gas is taken from South Texas and put into Midtex Pipeline at Dewville and taken out at Sheridan HPL mtr 8741/Midtex mtr 1587. Let me know if you need further information. Thanks Thu
